narrative:
Cols 65-D (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,157 registered voters, with 56.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 29.3%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 15.2 percentage points.
